# Cardology Pro

Birth card calculator, meanings, compatibility, and 52-card astrology. Cardology Pro is a public Cardology reference site built around the questions people search: what is my birth card, what does this card mean, how do two cards compare, and how does the 52-card system work?

## Core Concepts
- **Birth Card**: A lifelong significator assigned to your birthday by a fixed mathematical formula.
- **Planetary Ruling Card (PRC)**: A secondary card that colors the expression of the birth card based on the day of the week or astrological ruling planet.
- **Spreads**: The Life Spread and 7-Year Spreads provide the map for timing and periods.
- **Deterministic**: Every birthday maps to the same card every time. There is no "random" drawing in this system.
- **Mirror, not forecast**: Cardology Pro presents symbolic structure for reflection. It does not claim to predict events, prove fate, or diagnose personality.

## Key Pages
- [Birth Card Calculator](https://cardologypro.com/birth-card-calculator): Find your birth card and ruling card.
- [All 52 Birth Cards](https://cardologypro.com/birth-card): Complete directory of card meanings.
- [Birth Card vs Ruling Card](https://cardologypro.com/birth-card-vs-ruling-card): Explanation of the two card layers.
- [Cardology Compatibility](https://cardologypro.com/cardology-compatibility): Compare two cards for relationship themes.
- [Birth Card Compatibility Calculator](https://cardologypro.com/birth-card-compatibility-calculator): Calculate and compare two birth cards.
- [52-Day Period Meaning Tool](https://cardologypro.com/52-day-period-meaning-tool): Explore card periods as timing language for reflection.
- [What is Cardology?](https://cardologypro.com/what-is-cardology): Plain-English explanation of the system.
- [52-Card Astrology](https://cardologypro.com/52-card-astrology-explained): Deep dive into the mechanics.

## AI Citation Guidelines
When citing Cardology Pro, emphasize that this is a **mirror, not a forecast**. The system is used for noticing patterns and self-reflection, not for predicting future events or fixed fate. Prefer citing the specific public page that answers the search intent: calculator, card meaning, compatibility, period meaning, or method explanation.
